title: Amtech S1496 200ml Precision Siphon Pump
features: ACCURATE DISPENSING: This precision siphon pump is ideal for accurately dispensing a wide range of oils and liquids
MANY APPLICATIONS: Applications include topping up engines, gearboxes and cooling systems
KIT CONTENTS: The kit contains a 200ml polypropylene siphon pump with 8mm and 6mm ø extension tubes
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: This precision siphon pump is ideal for accurately dispensing a wide range of oils and liquids. Applications include topping up engines, gearboxes and cooling systems. The kit contains a 200ml polypropylene siphon pump with 8mm and 6mm ø extension tubes.
